text:
It’s bad enough we have to suffer through Operation Kamala Coconut Tree Brat Summer, but now the Olympics has to go woke and weird, too?

Is there anything left for normal people anymore?

I’m Tomi Lahren, more next.

Yes, I have come to the conclusion that there is nothing left for normal people anymore.

So I guess we shouldn’t be surprised that the Olympics based in France would give us this..

According to Paris organizers, the objectively odd Opening Ceremony with the bearded lady man, the drag queens, the naked blue man and the clear mockery of The Last Supper, wasn’t intended to offend anyone but rather to “celebrate community tolerance.”

Something tells me that if Islam was mocked like Christianity was with that Opening Ceremony, it would be a much different story!

I stopped caring about the Olympics when American athletes started kneeling or otherwise disrespecting our country, so I never planned to watch anyway.

No offense to the members of Team USA who are proudly representing our great country, but I’m gonna take a pass on Paris.

I’m Tomi Lahren and you watch my show “Tomi Lahren is Fearless” atOutkick.com
title: Olympics or Freak Show? | Fox News Commentary
author: Kylie Michael
